form.formComment: Four-year-old entire is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 2190m. Last start won by 2.25 m when quickly away, (Fr3) at this track (2:38.80) beating Isthisjustfantasy in No NR on April 7 at $3.60 at the bell was leading 3.2. Added to a fine record here by winning from this barrier on Tuesday and has strong claims again.

form.formComment: Nine-year-old gelding who has been thereabouts in recent starts. Last start surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr4) over 2190m after showing early pace at this track was 3rd-4.4 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by Fox Dan (2:44.10) in No NR on April 7 at $23. Will struggle from a wide draw. Facing a tough assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Surrendered the lead to Fox Dan approaching the 1600m mark.
Over raced in the early stages of the race.
Hung in briefly near the 250m contacting two marker pegs.

form.formComment: Carried through his consistent form from last preparation when first-up last start. Returned to racing with a won by a head as favourite (Fr5) at this track (2:44.10) beating Captain Perfect in No NR on April 7 at $1.30 at the bell was leading 2.2 Before going for a spell win at Melton over 2760m 3yo G1 No NR CG. Last season's Victoria Derby winner who will be fitter for the fresh win so can go on with it.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 2190m at this track, at the bell was 2nd-2.2 beaten a head by Fox Dan (2:44.10) in No NR on April 7 at $4.40. Two runs back won by 1.1 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Melton (2:02.70) beating My Ultimate Barney in NR up to 105 on March 21 at $1.35 at the bell was leading 4.07. In fine form. Eye catcher in his heat and won his only try at this longer distance so could be hard to hold out.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr3) over 2190m at this track was 4th-7.6 at the bell, beaten 11 m by My Ultimate Jimmy (2:38.80) in No NR on April 7 at $3.40.
